productIndexDescription: Buy smartphones, gadgets, and electronics in Turkmenistan at the best prices. Official warranty, fast delivery across the country, and top global brands.
productDetailsMetaDescription: Buy {product} in Turkmenistan for {price}. Official warranty, fast delivery across Turkmenistan. Order online today at {businessName}.
categoryDetailsMetaDescription: Buy {category} in Turkmenistan at the best prices. Wide selection, official warranty, and fast delivery across Turkmenistan at {businessName}.
categoryIndexDescription: Explore all product categories at {businessName}. Smartphones, gadgets, and electronics with official warranty and fast delivery across Turkmenistan.
homeIndexDescription: Buy smartphones, gadgets, and electronics at {businessName}. Best prices in Turkmenistan, official warranty, and fast nationwide delivery.
privacyPolicyIntroDesc: Welcome to Xmobile. This Privacy Policy applies to the Xmobile application and our related website (xmobile.com.tm). It covers the collection, use, sharing, and protection of your personal data.
privacyPolicyCollectDesc: We collect information you directly provide (name, email, phone number, address, passwords), automatically collected data (IP address, device location, device information, login activity), and third-party data (Firebase installation IDs for push notifications). We do not collect biometric data.
privacyPolicyPurposeDesc: We use your data for processing and delivering your orders, providing app features, website analytics, and security/fraud prevention.
privacyPolicyConsentDesc: By creating an account and using our app, you explicitly consent to the collection and processing of your personal data. You may withdraw your consent at any time by deleting your account.
privacyPolicySharingDesc: We share data with essential third-party service providers (Google/Firebase for notifications, Google Analytics for statistics, and Delivery Partners). We never sell your personal data.
privacyPolicyTransferDesc: While our store operates in Turkmenistan, our server infrastructure and services like Firebase may process or store data on secure servers located outside of Turkmenistan. By using our service, you consent to this transfer.
privacyPolicyStorageDesc: We use industry-standard security measures (e.g., hashed passwords) to protect your data. Data is retained for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, your data will be securely removed from our active databases.
privacyPolicyRightsDesc: You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal data. You can delete your account and data by contacting us.
privacyPolicyCookiesDesc: We use cookies strictly necessary for the application's functionality, such as keeping you logged in and remembering your language preferences.
privacyPolicyChildrenDesc: Our services are available to everyone. We do not have age restrictions.
privacyPolicyChangesDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The latest version will be available on this page.
privacyPolicyContactDesc: If you have any questions or data requests, please contact us at: Phone: +99361004933, +99371211717 Email: xmobiletm@gmail.com Address: Lebap province, Turkmenabat city, 3rd quarter microdistrict, S.A. Niyazov Avenue, Xmobile store.
